The Process

Up and Running in 15 Minutes

No permanent installation. No cameras. Portable sensors placed around the rink before your session — then let the AI do the work.

01

Place the Sensors

16 mobile tracking sensors set up around the outside of the rink in 15 minutes. Players clip a small sensor to their shoulder pads.

02

Track Your Session

The system captures every stride, burst, turn, and positioning decision at 3,000+ data points per second during games or practice.

03

Sync & Analyse

Data syncs to the cloud after the session. The AI automatically identifies over 20 individual hockey skills performed by each player.

04

Get Actionable Insights

Players, coaches, and parents receive dashboards with skill breakdowns, benchmarks against top performers, and progress tracking all season.

What We Offer

Analytics Services for Your Team

We bring Drive Hockey's full suite of analytics services to leagues, clubs, evaluation camps, and players at every level.

🏆

Player Evaluations & Rankings

Replace subjective tryout assessments with objective, data-driven rankings. Evaluators get sortable skill leaderboards and individual breakdowns from a single session.

📈

Player Development Programs

Track skill progression throughout the season. Players see exactly which skills to improve, benchmarked against top performers with a clear development path.

🎯

Game & Tactical Analytics

Auto-generated team and line combination intelligence. Analyse shifts, positioning, and situational play with an interactive replay and markup tool.

🛡️

Injury Prevention & Load Management

Detailed workload and fatigue data helps coaches minimise injury risk and manage return-to-play scenarios with objective metrics.

🔭

Scouting & Recruiting Support

Players opt into Drive Hockey's Central Scouting DB, making their performance data available to scouts and recruiters at higher levels of play.

🏟️

Association & League Programs

Bring analytics infrastructure to your entire association. We support arenas and leagues looking to modernise development and provide world-class tools to every team.

Who It's For

Built for Every Level of Hockey

From atom to junior, individual players to full associations — Drive Hockey analytics scales to your needs.

  • Auto-generated tactical game dashboards after every tracked session
  • Line combination analysis — see which combos drive team outcomes
  • Objective player development tracking, not just gut feel
  • Shift analysis and positioning heat maps with interactive replay
  • Fatigue and workload monitoring to prevent overtraining and injury
  • 15-minute rink setup — use it for games AND practice
  • Shareable reports for players, parents, and management

For Coaches

Stop guessing which players drive team performance. Get the same depth of game intelligence NHL coaching staffs rely on — automatically generated after every session.

  • 📊 Full team + individual skill breakdowns
  • 🏒 Works for games and practices
  • 📱 Dashboard accessible from any device
  • 🎯 Progress tracked across the entire season
